comments.text: If you visit the Upper Peninsula of Michigan & go to the shores of Lake Superior at night, be sure to bring a long-wave UV light source so you can hunt for fluorescent Yooper Stones. "Yooper" here is a play on 'U.P.' (Upper Peninsula), but they're rocks that contain a fluorescent mineral, sodalite.
This is Lake Superior at Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore in Munising, in Michigan’s Upper Peninsula.
Almost forgot #RockinTuesday! Here is a picture of just a small part of a very cool place, Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore on Lake Superior.

Chapel Rock located along the six mile Chapel Loop Trail. Made of weathered sandstone, this landmark stands near the edge of Lake Superior. It's host to a specimen of Michigan's state tree, the eastern white pine (Pinaceae: Pinus strobus). Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore, Michigan, 05/24/2012.

Sandstone stacked like ancient pages, each layer a chapter from 500 million years ago. At sunset, the cliffs of Pictured Rocks practically read themselves aloud. #RockinTuesday #photography #greatlakes #michigan #sunset #landscape #landscapephotography #nature #rocks #beach #summer

An #arch at Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore, Lake Superior, Upper Peninsula of Michigan.
#BlueSkyArtShow #photography #PicturedRocks #Michigan

The sandstone cliffs of Pictured Rocks rise above Lake Superior like a layered canvas topped with green pines. It was a brutally hot #summer day, so I should have opted to kayak instead of hike, but still beautiful. #BlueSkyArtShow #photography #michigan #cliffs #greatlakes #lakesuperior #nature

Kayaking is the best way to enjoy this amazing phenomenon on Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore in Michigan. Minerals leaching from the rock create these brightly colored stripes on the cliffs. #nature #photography #michigan #lakesuperior #landscapephotography #geology #geographicwonder

#ArtAdventCalendar I just finished this one last night! "Mackinac Straits with the Bridge" This is where Michigan's Lower Peninsula meets the Upper Peninsula, and where Lake Michigan meets Lake Huron. I think the boulders might be remnants of the Niagara Escarpment. $289 #traditionalart

Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore near Munising, Michigan. July 2024. #photography #landscapes

The rock formation Grand Portal is one of the awesome sights to see as you cruise along the Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore at Lake Superior. During the tourist season tours depart several times a day from nearby Munising, Michigan. #travel #photography #lakesuperior pixels.com/featured/gra...
Natural palette. A close look at Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore on Lake Superior.
The Lake Superior shoreline has been changing for eons. The sandstone cliffs at Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore took millions of years to form and are ancient and degrading slowly.

Pictured Rocks is a spectacular naturally sculptured lakeshore area of colorful sandstone cliffs, shallow caves, arches, and formations that resemble castle turrets. The sandstone is garnished by trees and greenery and bordered by the beautiful waters of Lake Superior.

2014 @ "Miners Castle" overlook at "Pictured Rocks National Lake Shore" on Lake Superior, Upper Peninsula of Michigan, USA . D800, 27mm #MinersCastle, #picturedrocks, #nationallakeshore, #upperpeninsula, #michigan, #waterscape, #landscape, #photography

Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore along the southern coast of Lake Superior, which is home to many miles of beautiful rock formations and beaches. There’s a gull soaring above the cliffs in this picture, which is a very common sight! Alger County, #michigan

Was just reading an article about a Great Lakes road trip & Pictured Rocks was on the list! I would add Wolf Trap NP for the Performing Arts in Virginia- a totally different park experience!
Pictured Rocks overlooking Lake Superior, Michigan. Such a happy place.

A view from a boat tour at Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore, MI. Swimming, hiking, camping and Pictured Rocks Cruises can all be found along the shores of Lake Superior. A nice place to stay is the Terrace Bay Hotel in Gladstone.
#PicturedRocksCruises #TerraceBayHotel #freshwatertavern

The Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore sits along Lake Superior, notorious for capricious weather among the earth's large fresh water bodies. Good photo conditions are rare, hence my joy in capturing sun & clouds to enhance the natural rock and leaf colors. It took four years for me to get these. 😱
Lake Superior, Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore, Michigan Photo courtesy of Gregory Lloyd
Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore. A beautiful piece of Lake Superior.
Pictured rocks at Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore, Lake Superior.
amaze. at one point it looks like Lake Superior on a windy day lapping at Pictured Rocks.

I would also say Pictured Rocks! I'm going out west next month (CO, ID, UT, MT) but making stops on the way home in ND, MN, and the last stop is Pictured Rocks for 3 nights in MI! This will be my 4th or 5th time there, I love the Great Lakes.
Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore, Alger County, Upper Peninsula, MI. 42 miles of frontage on the southeast shore of Lake Superior. First national lakeshore, established 1965.

Lake Superior rocking and rolling. Upper Michigan 1/11/26

Pictured Rocks — the iron-stained Cambrian sandstone bluffs run about forty-two miles along Lake Superior between Munising and Grand Marais. Designated the first National Lakeshore in the country in 1966.
Pictured Rocks National Lakeshore on Lake Superior. July 2024.
